old_column.content: import { ariaAttr, dataAttr, getEventKey, isEditableElement, isSelfTarget, isValidTabEvent } from "@zag-js/dom-query"

new_column.content: import { ariaAttr, dataAttr, getEventKey, isEditableElement, isSelfTarget, isValidTabEvent } from "@zag-js/dom-query"

old_column.content: import type { EventKeyMap, NormalizeProps, PropTypes } from "@zag-js/types"

new_column.content: import type { EventKeyMap, NormalizeProps, PropTypes } from "@zag-js/types"

old_column.content: import type { CascadeSelectApi, CascadeSelectSchema, ItemProps, ItemState, TreeNode } from "./cascade-select.types"

new_column.content: import type { CascadeSelectApi, CascadeSelectSchema, ItemProps, ItemState, TreeNode } from "./cascade-select.types"

old_column.content: export function connect<T extends PropTypes, V = TreeNode>(

new_column.content: export function connect<T extends PropTypes, V = TreeNode>(

old_column.content: const { send, context, prop, scope, computed, state } = service

new_column.content: const { send, context, prop, scope, computed, state } = service

old_column.content: const { item, indexPath, value: itemValue } = props

new_column.content: const { item, indexPath, value: itemValue } = props

old_column.content: const highlighted = itemValue.every((v, i) => v === highlightedValue[i])

new_column.content: const highlighted = itemValue.every((v, i) => v === highlightedValue[i])

old_column.content: const highlightedChild = children[highlightedIndexPath[depth]] as V | undefined

new_column.content: const highlightedChild = children[highlightedIndexPath[depth]] as V | undefined

old_column.content: const highlightedItemId = highlightedValue ? dom.getItemId(scope, highlightedValue.toString()) : undefined

new_column.content: const highlightedItemId = highlightedValue ? dom.getItemId(scope, highlightedValue.toString()) : undefined

old_column.content: // cascader should not be navigated using tab key so we prevent it

new_column.content: // cascader should not be navigated using tab key so we prevent it

old_column.content: send({ type: "POINTER_MOVE", clientX: event.clientX, clientY: event.clientY, target: event.target })

new_column.content: send({ type: "POINTER_MOVE", clientX: event.clientX, clientY: event.clientY, target: event.target })
